label: Instruction Detail
description: Persistent detail panel for the selected instruction. Shows legs, fills, compliance, and timeline.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: — pure detail/selection panel; no async data fetch; content is driven by selectedInstruction from context which is a derived memo over already-loaded data.

0.7.note: — renders 'Select a row in the instruction pipeline table to view detail here.' when selectedInstruction is null.

0.8.note: — no async fetch; error state is not reachable in this widget.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: [instructions]. 0.4 PASS — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — pure detail/selection panel; no async data fetch; content is driven by selectedInstruction from context which is a derived memo over already-loaded data. 0.7 PASS — renders 'Select a row in the instruction pipeline table to view detail here.' when selectedInstruction is null. 0.8 N/A — no async fetch; error state is not reachable in this widget. 0.9 PASS — no dead code.

1.1.note: — data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook via selectedInstruction derived value.

1.2.note: — context calls useGlobalScope(); filteredInstructions (which drives selectedInstruction lookup) is scope-filtered.

1.3.note: — org filter changes filteredInstructions; selectedInstruction is looked up within filteredInstructions so org change propagates.

1.4.note: — client filter cascades through scopeStrategyIds into filteredInstructions.

1.5.note: — strategy filter cascades the same way.

1.6.note: — empty scope arrays result in unfiltered dataset in context.

1.7.note: — no reference data constants defined in this widget; config constants live in lib/config/.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS — data sourced exclusively from useInstructionsData() hook via selectedInstruction derived value. 1.2 PASS — context calls useGlobalScope(); filteredInstructions (which drives selectedInstruction lookup) is scope-filtered. 1.3 PASS — org filter changes filteredInstructions; selectedInstruction is looked up within filteredInstructions so org change propagates. 1.4 PASS — client filter cascades through scopeStrategyIds into filteredInstructions. 1.5 PASS — strategy filter cascades the same way. 1.6 PASS — empty scope arrays result in unfiltered dataset in context. 1.7 PASS — no reference data constants defined in this widget; config constants live in lib/config/.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.
